title: Error-Correcting Prompt
scenario: Write a prompt that can identify and correct specific errors in a given text. The prompt should be able to handle varying levels of complexity and provide clear explanations for each corrected error.
constraints: Must use a specific set of error types (e.g., syntax, semantic, typographical)

evaluationCriteria.description: Can the generated prompt identify the given errors?
Are the corrected errors accurate and correct?
How clear and concise is the generated explanation for each corrected error?
